chinese_news.title: 登顶GitHub Hacker News，这个开源项目让AI编程成本降低 98%｜涌现新项目
chinese_news.summary:
文｜李嘉星

编辑｜周鑫雨

一句话介绍

context-mode 是一款专为 AI 编程打造的上下文优化 MCP（Anthropic 发布的模型上下文协议）插件。

它解决了开发者在长周期开发中遭遇的“模型失忆”与“Token 过多消耗”的核心痛点。

据团队表示，在编程场景下，context-mode 能够让 AI 编程的成本降低 98%，同时将大模型的记忆力从30分钟提升至 3 小时。

团队背景

context-mode 的背后是一支背景多元的跨国初创团队。目前团队的核心成员分布在土耳其、法国等 4 个国家，主要通过 GitHub 异步协作。

Mert Köseoğlu（核心开发者、创始人）：曾作为技术顾问为 OpenAI 等企业提供技术服务，拥有超 10 年全栈工程与系统架构经验。创业前，他曾先后任职于 Countly、Planh

chinese_news.title: 康养地产的“闭环”，北京山谷找到了
chinese_news.summary:
当一个行业的概念产出远超实际交付时，外界的审视就变得格外重要。

环京康养地产就是典型。过去几年，打着康养旗号的项目遍地开花。但绝大多数最终倒在同一个地方——交付。配套缩水、运营停滞、社区空置，成了这个赛道的常态。

但这不代表市场没有需求。恰恰相反，北京康养市场的供需矛盾相当尖锐。据《北京市老龄事业发展报告（2024）》，2024年末全市60岁及以上常住人口突破514万人，其中超过80%属于低龄健康老年群体。他们需要的不是传统护理型养老，而是兼顾生活品质、医疗保障和身心全方位康养的品质居所。

与此同时，都市中青年群体的亚健康问题也在推动康养需求边界外延。大量“上班族”中青年也需要一个不在远方的“远方”来治愈短暂的身心。

在北京1小时生活圈内，长期缺少一个真正打通生态、医疗、疗愈、居住四个维度的完整康养解决方案。这个结构性缺口，正是理解北京山谷市场表现的核心坐标。

chinese_news.title: 硬氪观察 | WWDC 2026：苹果终于在AI上迈出一小步，国内iPhone还是用不上
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 邱晓芬

编辑 | 袁斯来

6月9日，位于加州库比蒂诺的苹果总部被Swift标志性的暖色系渐变背景填满，熟悉的倒计时欢呼声依旧，但WWDC 2026选了一条更克制的路线——

这次，苹果没有如往常一般发布新硬件，也不预热万众瞩目的折叠屏，而是把一个多小时演讲的最大篇幅，留给了软件与AI。

显然，苹果正试图把过去两年的"AI迟到者"的标签，编译成另一套叙事。

在发布会上，苹果软件工程高级副总裁克雷格·费德里吉（Craig Federighi）先是纠偏了多数AI的产品思路——他认为，大部分公司都在急着往前跑，"为了AI而AI"，却始终没考虑真正要服务的用户。

或许是在隐晦为苹果过去缺席AI做出解释，在他看来，苹果在AI上的定调是，AI必须以人为中心，要个性化、且有用。具体体现在，AI不仅要懂用户的个人环境、常用的应用、读懂用户当前的屏幕，且每一步的设计都要以尊重隐私为前提。

在关注AI之余，大众的另一个关注点是，这

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 国内唯一POD材料产业化团队再创业，布局3C与AI芯片散热，技术积累全球领先
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，苏州墨锋新材料科技有限公司（下称“墨锋科技”）近日完成新一轮千万元融资，由险峰基金、成都科创投集团投资，资金将主要用于产线扩建与产能扩张。

墨锋科技成立于2023年，技术源自四川大学近20年高分子材料研究成果，聚焦高性能POD（聚芳噁二唑）薄膜产业化。

POD作为一种耐高温聚合物，早在上世纪六七十年代便受到关注，但由于加工成型过程中的工艺问题和设备腐蚀问题，产业化难度极高，相关研究一度长期停滞。

国内对于POD的系统性研究起步较晚，但进展迅速。2006年前后，四川大学徐建军教授团队开始持续推进POD材料研究；2008年，江苏宝德新材料采用四川大学相关技术建立POD纤维中试线，并于2011年实现量产，成为国内唯一实现POD纤维产业化的企业。

墨锋科技核心团队均来自四川大学徐建军教授课题组。公司创始人李文涛曾在江苏宝德新材料参与并主持POD纤维从小试、中试到量产及市场开拓的全过程，具备丰富产业

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | AI芯片处理器IP公司完成近亿元融资，核心团队来自Synopsys、ARM等顶尖半导体公司
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，隼瞻科技有限公司（下称“隼瞻科技”）近日完成近亿元天使+轮融资。本轮融资引入英飞尼迪资本、白云金控、深圳中小担创投、厚天资本、华盖资本、嘉誉创投等多家战略投资人，老股东毅达资本、达泰资本持续加持。

隼瞻科技成立于2023年初，专注芯片处理器模块及开发平台，致力于打造基于“RISC-V+DSA”的新一代处理器设计体系，公司希望通过“IP货架+EDA工具链”的模式，降低AI时代定制化处理器设计门槛。

当前，AI模型快速垂直化，正在推动芯片产业从“通用计算”走向“专用计算”。

过去，以CPU为核心的架构长期主导芯片设计，但AI算法以大规模二维、三维矩阵运算为主，在传统CPU上的运行效率并不理想。行业也逐渐转向NPU、VPU、TPU等专用处理器协同的异构计算体系。

与此同时，AI模型的快速垂直化，也让芯片设计开始从“通用适配”走向“模型驱动”。

“过去很多算法都能直接跑在CPU上

chinese_news.title: 生殖学博士入局脑机接口，想做一款缓解女性经期情绪问题的脑机"发箍"｜早期项目
chinese_news.summary:
文｜胡香赟

编辑｜海若镜

对许多女性而言，经期不只是一次生理周期的重复，更是一场身心双重的考验。腹痛、头痛、疲劳、焦虑、易怒……这些经前期综合征（PMS）带来的不适，严重时甚至会影响工作和生活。然而，目前主流的缓解方式仍然高度依赖止痛药，长期服药存在副作用风险，而物理热敷、休息调整固然能带来一定舒缓，却效果有限。

有没有一种更温和、无创的方式，能安全有效地缓解经期不适？这一市场痛点，吸引了一位生殖学博士跨界进入脑机接口领域，试图用科技为女性经期健康问题带来新的解题思路。

智子银河成立于2026年，专注于无创脑机接口等产品开发。智子银河总裁黄河龙博士毕业于中国科学技术大学，拥有多年生殖学学术积累，曾就职于云锋基金、建银国际等，也是一名连续创业者，具备10余年医疗科技领域的投融资经验。目前，智子银河技术团队近半数成员拥有博士学位，覆盖脑科学及认知神经等学科领域。

黄河龙提到，再次创业之所以选择布局脑机接口赛道，主要是基于行业前景、市场竞争格局、资源复用等因素的综合考量。首先，在政策层面，“脑机接

chinese_news.title: 「百奥几何」完成数亿元战略融资，打造生命科学"微观世界模型"｜36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
文｜胡香赟

编辑｜海若镜

36氪获悉，近日，AI原生生物科技公司百奥几何已完成数亿元战略融资。由上海生物医药创新转化基金、国科投资、达晨财智、星连资本联合领投，高榕资本、指数人工智能产业创新基金跟投。指数资本担任独家财务顾问。另据介绍，本轮募集资金将重点用于生命科学微观世界模型GeoFlow的持续迭代，以及自研药物管线的推进。

当前，人工智能正沿两条主线加速演进：以大语言模型与多模态模型为代表的数字AI（Digital AI），以自动驾驶与人形机器人为代表的物理AI（Physical AI）。而生命AI（Bio AI）或将成为下一个最具想象力的疆域，这一判断，正被全球顶级资本与科学界持续确认。

2024年，诺贝尔化学奖同时授予蛋白质结构预测与蛋白质从头设计两个方向；2025年，中国创新药BD交易金额达1357亿美元，占全球交易金额约49%，超越美国成为全球创新药对外授权第一大市场；2026年5月，Alphabet旗下Isomorphic Labs完成21亿美元融资，由Thrive Capital领投，淡马锡、

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will OpenAI file S-1 and announce IPO by December 31, 2026?

prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: OpenAI confidentially files for IPO; Perplexity CEO signals 2028 IPO, suggesting market may be saturating near-term AI debut slots.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Iran–US deal be signed within 90 days (by August 4, 2026)?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Trump claims deal in 'two or three days'; Strait of Hormuz closure is driving alternative pipeline construction and oil volatility.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: Trump statement on Iran deal timeline; BBC: Israel–Iran flare-up suggests Tehran emboldened but Trump appetite for risk low.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $70,000 on or before June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BTC above $63k with SpaceX IPO labeled as 'next catalyst'; OpenAI/Anthropic mega-cap IPO wave and geopolitical Hormuz uncertainty are competing macro drivers.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk: Bitcoin above $63k; Strategy CEO adds $100M BTC; crypto volatility spike on tech sector jitters and Middle East tension.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will US pass CLARITY Act (crypto regulatory clarity) by September 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: 200+ crypto firms pushing Senate; regulatory tailwind narrative growing alongside IPO wave for AI and space companies.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph: Over 200 crypto firms push Senate to pass CLARITY Act; UK FCA floats 10% crypto allocation for retail funds.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Nvidia stock (NVDA) outperform S&P 500 by >5% through December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: AI stock meltdown cited by research firm; Hacker News dominance by Apple AI news and MiMo-v2.5 tokenization efficiency suggest NVDA may face margin pressure from soft inference wins.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will crude oil price (WTI) average above $85/barrel in June 2026, given Strait of Hormuz supply risk?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: FRED Economic Data (U.S. Energy Information Administration WTI series) or CME Futures settlement
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Market pricing in near-term Trump deal narrative; Iraq/UAE pipeline acceleration suggests hedging, but risk of short-term supply shock before pipelines operational.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: Iraq cabinet approved Kurdistan-Turkey pipeline acceleration; all-in news flow suggests <50% of traders accounting for 3-6 month implementation lag.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Anthropic (or its parent) announce Series C+ funding or IPO filing at a valuation >$25B by September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: SEC EDGAR filing (confidential or public S-1), press release from Anthropic or investor, or PitchBook/Crunchbase Series C+ announcement
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: OpenAI confidential filing + Perplexity CEO explicit 2028 IPO claim creates narrative that Anthropic may accelerate; no market yet prices in mid-2026 capital event.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Anthropic confidential filing weeks after OpenAI; 36Kr: WWDC 2026 shows Apple picking Google Gemini, not OpenAI—implies Anthropic lost key partnership, raising need for capital to fund model development.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will SpaceX IPO price be announced (S-1 filing or final pricing) by August 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: SEC EDGAR S-1/A filing, press release from SpaceX, or IPO pricing wire service (IPO Edge, Renaissance Capital, Dealogic)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CoinDesk cites SpaceX IPO as 'next catalyst' for BTC; market assumes Q2 2026 timeline but regulatory/valuation delays common for mega-caps.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: OpenAI and Anthropic confidential filings in May suggest crowded Q2–Q3 IPO calendar; SpaceX regulatory clearance timeline historically unpredictable.

market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap, or Kraken/FTX/Binance spot price

market_questions_to_create.question: Will UK FCA formally approve >5% crypto allocation in retail investment funds by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: UK FCA official handbook update, policy statement, or regulated fund prospectus allowing such allocation (e.g., CASS, FUND rules amendment)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Cointelegraph: FCA floated 10% allocation; U.S. has yet to formally approve (only Bitcoin/Ether spot ETFs); EU regulatory arbitrage means early UK action could trigger ESMA guidance and U.S. SEC follow-through.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CLARITY Act pushing in U.S. Senate; UK proactively moving first suggests race-to-bottom regulatory competition among developed markets; no existing market prices probability this high.

investment_theses.thesis: Iran deal near-term (2-3 months) will underdeliver on Strait of Hormuz reopening; Iraq/UAE pipeline build-out will lag 12+ months, creating sustained oil supply premium that benefits commodity derivatives and weakens tech mega-caps via margin squeeze.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Trump claims 'two or three days' but BBC reports Iran emboldened and Trump risk appetite low—classic gap between headline and reality.
CNBC: Iraq cabinet approved pipeline acceleration but UAE/Turkey infrastructure timelines historically slip; CIF Hormuz still optimal route for 6–12 months.
BBC: Equity market jitters from tech sell-off and Middle East attacks; oil volatility persists despite deal optimism.
investment_theses.counter_view: Trump closes deal fast and Hormuz reopens immediately, collapsing oil and lifting risk-on sentiment; NVIDIA/AI mega-caps rally on broad growth repricing.
investment_theses.expression: Long crude oil (WTI or USO) and short NVDA or QQQ 6-month spread; or long DXY as oil weakness supports safe-haven flows.

investment_theses.thesis: OpenAI, Anthropic, Perplexity mega-cap IPO wave (2026–2028) will compress AI infrastructure (compute, chips, data center) into a K-shaped market: mega-cap lab IPOs face margin compression from soft inference wins (Apple/Google models), while mid-tier semiconductor suppliers (chip design IP, thermal management, PCB) and Solana/high-throughput blockchains capture AI agent infrastructure premium.
supporting_signals: 36Kr: context-mode reduces AI coding cost 98%, MiMo-v2.5 achieves 1000 tokens/sec (commoditizing inference); Apple picks Google Gemini—not OpenAI.
36Kr: AI chip processor IP (隼瞻科技 ~100M yuan raise), POD thermal film (墨锋科技) are seeing heavy funding, signaling margin shift downstream.
Cointelegraph: AI agents with crypto could escape; Solana ecosystem uniquely positioned for high-freq autonomous agents.
CoinDesk: Bitcoin above $63k; crypto trading volume and AI-meme volatility (Humanity Protocol 80% crash) signal emerging agent-driven market microstructure.
investment_theses.counter_view: Mega-cap AI labs (OpenAI, Anthropic) maintain pricing power; NVIDIA continues domination; inference efficiency gains prove transient.
investment_theses.expression: Long SOL, short NVDA; or long MU/SSNLF (chip design/thermal management) and short QQQ; or long semiconductor specialty (Applied Materials AXP in low-power thermal segment) vs. broad NVDA.

investment_theses.thesis: Trump's Iran deal narrative + Strait of Hormuz closure will trigger a 6-12 month energy commodity super-cycle and safe-haven bid (DXY, gold, UST duration); concurrent mega-cap AI IPO wave will compete for equity capital, creating a crowded IPO calendar that delays smaller rounds and triggers venture debt spike.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Hormuz alternative pipelines under acceleration; oil already volatile; Trump claims near-term deal but BBC suggests low conviction.
36Kr & CNBC: OpenAI, Anthropic, Perplexity all filing/planning 2026–2028 IPOs; crowded pipeline raises risk of retail equity fatigue.
CoinDesk: Bitcoin >$63k, venture capital chasing AI/space IPO windows; later-stage crypto and biotech rounds face funding pressure.
investment_theses.counter_view: Oil deal closes fast, Hormuz reopens, energy sell-off; IPO wave attracts broad capital; VCs flush with LP dry powder.
investment_theses.expression: Long DXY (commodity diversification hedge), long gold/GLD, long UST long-duration (TLT), short equity risk premium (sell VIX puts or go short volatility-linked carry trades); pair with short equity beta (short SPY or long put spreads on QQQ).

investment_theses.thesis: Bitcoin and Solana will outperform broader crypto and equities as regulatory clarity (CLARITY Act) and AI agent adoption (Cointelegraph narrative) converge; Bitcoin as macro hedge to oil/geopolitical premium, Solana as execution layer for autonomous agents. Ethereum faces margin pressure from Solana and L2 competition, particularly in agent-driven trading.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Bitcoin above $63k on institutional inflows (Strategy CEO +$100M); CLARITY Act tailwind from 200+ crypto firms lobbying.
Cointelegraph: AI agents + crypto framework poses unique risk/opportunity; Solana ecosystem already optimized for high-throughput MEV and bot trading.
Hacker News: MiMo-v2.5 inference acceleration + crypto volatility (Humanity Protocol 85% crash) suggest agent-driven market microstructure emerging.
36Kr: Chinese AI chip/thermal funding wave suggests Solana-adjacent execution infrastructure gaining real adoption.
investment_theses.counter_view: Ethereum L2s (Arbitrum, Optimism) scale faster; base-layer speed irrelevant for agent adoption; Bitcoin faces regulatory headwinds (AML/FATF).
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC/USD and SOL/USD (spot or perpetual futures); short ETH/USD or long BTC/ETH ratio; or go long SOL and short ETH 6-month perp.

investment_theses.thesis: Apple's adoption of Google Gemini (not OpenAI) and soft-inference commodity narrative will trigger a rotation from mega-cap AI lab stocks (OpenAI private→IPO, Anthropic) into semiconductor design IP, thermal management, and edge AI inference plays. NVIDIA faces margin compression; mid-tier semiconductor suppliers and chiplet design IP firms gain.
supporting_signals: 36Kr: Apple WWDC 2026 reveals Gemini-based AI (not OpenAI partnership); Apple is largest smartphone OEM and now diversifying model source.
36Kr: POD thermal film, AI chip processor IP (隼瞻科技) raising heavy growth capital; market recognizes edge/inference shift.
Hacker News: MiMo-v2.5-Pro-UltraSpeed and context-mode inference efficiency signal tokenization/compute commoditization.
CoinDesk: Research firm blamed for AI stock meltdown; margin compression narrative gaining traction.
investment_theses.counter_view: Apple inference uses Gemini on-device; OpenAI/Anthropic still control training frontier; mega-cap labs maintain edge model rents.
investment_theses.expression: Short NVDA vs. long MU or Applied Materials (AXP) in thermal/low-power segment; or long semiconductor materials ETF (XLF, SMH filtered on design/process IP) and short QQQ; or long chip design IP SPACs/private exits (e.g., 隼瞻科技-exposed vehicles if they emerge).
